# @json-express/adapter-memory — AI Context

Default in-memory database adapter (part of `@json-express/boot`). Data lives in RAM; restarts reset to the contents of `data/*.json`.

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/adapter-memory
```
Discovery is automatic. **Never import, instantiate, or register this package in code.** If more than one `adapter-*` is installed, activate with `jex.adapter=@json-express/adapter-memory` in `.env`.

## Configuration (.env)
No package-specific keys.

## What it unlocks
- Full CRUD for every collection in `data/` and every model in `models/`.
- Relation expansion: `GET /albums?_expand=artist` resolves `relation` fields defined in models.
- Unique-constraint enforcement from `types.string({ unique: true })` fields.
- Ideal for tests and prototyping; swap to `adapter-json` (file persistence) or `adapter-postgres`/`adapter-mongodb` (real DBs) without touching data or models.
